caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses performs music in an indoor setting featuring a wall of light-colored horizontal blinds. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a black vest with decorative blue floral embroidery, and a red and white accessory around his neck. He holds a light-colored acoustic guitar and sings into a microphone mounted on a black stand. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of several audience members are visible, though they remain out of focus. The text "ORCA" is displayed in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, with slight changes in his facial expressions and mouth movements as he sings. The camera angle and composition remain consistent across the duration of the clip.
